title: Psychotria exigua
intro: Psychotria exigua, also known as the small yellow Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria exigua include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Psychotria exigua include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
